description_long: This modern L-shaped lounge features a sleek, minimalist design with a white upholstered seat and backrest, complemented by three large, plush back cushions and a chaise section for extended comfort. The frame is constructed from a combination of white-painted metal or wood, with natural wood accent panels integrated into the armrest and chaise end, adding warmth and contrast to the overall look. The lounge is paired with a low, round black coffee table that has a smooth, slightly concave surface, providing a functional centerpiece. The seat cushions are thick and inviting, while the back cushions are loose and generously sized, offering ample support. The legs are straight and sturdy, finished in white to match the frame, and are set at the corners for stability. This ensemble is ideal for urban parks, patios, or communal outdoor spaces, blending contemporary aesthetics with comfort and utility.
description: A modern L-shaped lounge with white upholstery, wood accents, and three large back cushions, paired with a round black coffee table. The design is sleek and inviting, suitable for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shaped lounge with three white back cushions, wood accent panels, and the round black coffee table in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise section, wood accent on the armrest, and the coffee table positioned to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the backrest, all three cushions, and the wood accent at the end of the chaise, with the coffee table partially visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, focusing on the wood accent at the chaise end and the coffee table in the background.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions evenly spaced along the backrest, with a single seat cushion extending across the L-shape and a chaise section; cushions are plush and rectangular.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest running the length of the lounge, supporting the loose cushions; no visible tufting or segmentation, clean and modern lines.
attribute_armrest_presence: One integrated low-profile armrest with a wood accent at the end of the chaise section; no armrest on the main seating side.
attribute_leg_style: Straight, square-profile legs in white, positioned at the corners, medium height, simple and functional with no decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid white upholstery with a smooth, matte finish; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
